top_signals.title: Ryanair Investigated Over Charging Parents to Sit With Children
top_signals.summary: Ryanair Holdings Plc. is facing a consumer investigation over fees that parents have to pay to sit next to their children.

top_signals.title: Volatile summer weather threatens to turn World Cup into test of heat
top_signals.summary: Climate change has increased the likelihood of temperatures ⁠high enough to affect player ​performance at 97 of the 104 tournament matches, according to new research.
